4U (Avg. 83g): G5, G6
3U (Avg. 88g): G4, G5, G6

Developed with input from Kento Momota for powerful offensive play.
Namd graphite offers enhanced shaft flexibility and resilience.
Excellent for both attacking shots and defensive plays with quick recovery.
